[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.39)" background_image="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/food-background-business-hours.jpg?_t=1726125245" background_blend="overlay" dipl_enable_particle_background="on" dipl_disabled_on="off|off|off" dipl_particle_number="17" dipl_particle_color="#E02B20" dipl_enable_hover_interactivity="on" dipl_hover_mode="bubble" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_4,1_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||align-items: center;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_css_main_element_tablet="display: block;" custom_css_main_element_phone="display: block;"][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_tabs fullwidth_tabs="on" tab_spaces="1px" nav_bg_color="#E02B20" active_tab_background_color="#E02B20" tab_background_color="#f9eff1" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" active_title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_text_color="#E02B20" body_text_text_color="#000000" background_color="#FFFFFF" hover_enabled="0" box_shadow_style="preset3" box_shadow_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.1)" global_colors_info="{}" sticky_enabled="0"][dipl_tabs_item title="Cuisines" tab_custom_padding="10px|30px|10px|30px|false|true" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Italian: Pizza, pasta, risotto, lasagna, gelato.

Mexican: Tacos, burritos, enchiladas, quesadillas, guacamole.

Chinese: Dumplings, Peking duck, sweet and sour pork, spring rolls.

Indian: Curry, biryani, samosas, naan, dosa.

Japanese: Sushi, sashimi, ramen, tempura, miso soup.

French: Croissants, quiche, coq au vin, ratatouille, crème brûlée.

Thai: Pad Thai, green curry, tom yum soup, spring rolls, mango sticky rice.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Meals" tab_custom_padding="10px|30px|10px|30px|false|true" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Breakfast: Pancakes, omelets, smoothies, bagels, yogurt.

Lunch: Sandwiches, salads, soups, wraps, sushi.

Dinner: Steak, roasted chicken, pasta dishes, stir-fries, casseroles.

Snacks: Chips, nuts, fruit, cheese, crackers.

Desserts: Cakes, cookies, ice cream, pastries, pies.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Regional Specialty" tab_custom_padding="10px|30px|10px|30px|false|true" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Mediterranean: Hummus, falafel, tabbouleh, gyros.

Middle Eastern: Shawarma, kebabs, baklava, mezze.

Caribbean: Jerk chicken, plantains, rum cake, ackee and saltfish.

African: Jollof rice, injera, tagine, biltong.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Dietary Needs" tab_custom_padding="10px|30px|10px|30px|false|true" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Low-Carb: Keto-friendly dishes, salads, grilled meats.

High-Protein: Chicken breast, fish, legumes, protein shakes.

Low-Fat: Lean meats, steamed vegetables, fruit.

Sugar-Free: Sugar-free desserts, unsweetened beverages, low-sugar snacks.

[/dipl_tabs_item][/dipl_tabs][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_blurb title="Call" use_icon="on" font_icon="||fa||900" icon_color="#FFFFFF" image_icon_background_color="#E02B20" icon_placement="left" image_icon_width="20px" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" image_icon_custom_padding="10px|10px|10px|10px|true|true" hover_enabled="0" custom_css_blurb_title="padding-bottom: 0px;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_blurb_content_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_css_blurb_content_tablet="margin-left: 0px;" custom_css_blurb_content_phone="margin-left: 0px;" admin_label="Call" sticky_enabled="0"]

000-000-0000
